dialogue.line: No, no, no, no, no. Look. [TV off] There. Sweet gesture? I don't turn my show off for anybody.

jokes.text: Larry, it's Artie. I know you went to dinner with Francine, but, Jesus, god, lad, I'm warning you, don't have sex with her. Larry?
jokes.setup: Artie calling to warn Larry about Francine
jokes.punchline: The warning coming immediately after Larry has obviously already had sex with her
jokes.explanation: Perfect timing for Artie's protective warning - classic too-late comedy

dialogue.speaker: Artie
dialogue.line: Larry, it's Artie. I know you went to dinner with Francine, but, Jesus, god, lad, I'm warning you, don't have sex with her. Larry?
